description: Perform a graph projection to summarize the social network by nationality using the 'demodb' database (user: admin, pass: admin). Create a vertex class 'NationalityNode' with properties 'Name' (String) and 'ProfileCount' (Integer), populated with one vertex for each distinct nationality in the 'Profiles' class and the corresponding count of profiles. Create an edge class 'NationalityLink' with property 'FriendshipCount' (Integer) to represent aggregated friendships. For every friendship between profiles of different nationalities, create a single 'NationalityLink' from the alphabetically earlier nationality to the later one, setting 'FriendshipCount' to the total number of such friendships in either direction. Generate a report at '/home/ga/nationality_network_report.txt' listing the total number of nationalities, total connections, the strongest connection, and a list of all connections with their counts.
